import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { FiHome, FiSearch, FiUser, FiLogOut, FiMenu, FiX, FiPlus } from 'react-icons/fi'; const Navbar = () => { const { user, isAuthenticated, logout } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/'); setIsMenuOpen(false); }; const toggleMenu = () => { setIsMenuOpen(!isMenuOpen); }; return (
{/* Logo */}

{/* Dropdown Menu */}

{user?.name}

{user?.role}

Dashboard Profile My Bookings
) : (
Login Sign Up
)}
{/* Mobile menu button */}
{/* Mobile Navigation */} {isMenuOpen && (
setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Find Rooms {isAuthenticated ? ( <> {user?.role === 'owner' && ( setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Add Room )}

{user?.name}

{user?.role}

setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Dashboard setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Profile setIsMenuOpen(false)} > My Bookings
) : (
setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Login setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Sign Up
)}
)}
); }; export default Navbar;
